title: verbascum × chium
intro: Verbascum × chium, also known as Mullein, is a hybrid plant species in the figwort family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant, loosening and removing mucus from the lungs and airways. The health benefits of Verbascum × chium include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma, bronchitis, and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Mullein can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with dried leaves and flowers often used in smoking blends to soothe respiratory issues.
